UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user profile information, preferences, and status.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short biography of the user.

interestedIn.description: Genders the user is interested in.

role.description: The user's role in the application.

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated.

Match.title: Match
Match.description: Represents a match between two users.

users.description: The UIDs of the two matched users.

lastMessage.description: The content of the last message sent in this match.

lastMessageTimestamp.description: When the last message was sent.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A single message sent within a match's chat.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

text.description: The text content of the message.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: Represents a like or super like from one user to another.

fromUid.description: The UID of the user who liked.

toUid.description: The UID of the user who was liked.

isSuper.description: Whether it was a super like.

/matches/{matchId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Subcollection of messages for a specific match.
